ucs.title: [LLM] Cl0p / FIN11 LEMURLOOT-DEWMODE webshell drop on MFT appliances (MOVEit / GoAnywhere / Cleo / Accellion)
ucs.description: Hunts the file-write footprint Cl0p (TA505 / FIN11 / GRACEFUL SPIDER) leaves after SQL-injecting an internet-facing managed file transfer appliance: the IIS worker (w3wp.exe) writes .aspx/.ashx webshells (human2.aspx / health.aspx — LEMURLOOT on MOVEit, DEWMODE on Accellion) into the appliance's wwwroot. This is THE 2021–2024 Cl0p signature behind the Accellion FTA, GoAnywhere MFT (CVE-2023-0669), MOVEit Transfer (CVE-2023-34362) and Cleo Harmony / VLTrader / LexiCom (CVE-2024-50623, CVE-2024-55956) mass-extortion campaigns.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.process_name="w3wp.exe" AND ((Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\MOVEitTransfer\\wwwroot\\*","*\\GoAnywhere\\*","*\\Cleo\\Harmony\\*","*\\Cleo\\VLTrader\\*","*\\Cleo\\LexiCom\\*","*\\Accellion\\*","*\\PaperCut*") AND Filesystem.file_name IN ("*.aspx","*.ashx","*.asp","*.jsp")) OR Filesystem.file_name IN ("human2.aspx","human.aspx","health.aspx","DEWMODE.html","_human2.aspx")) by host Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// Cl0p / FIN11 webshell drop on MFT appliances — LEMURLOOT (human2.aspx) / DEWMODE
let _mft_paths = dynamic([@"\MOVEitTransfer\wwwroot\", @"\GoAnywhere\", @"\Cleo\Harmony\", @"\Cleo\VLTrader\", @"\Cleo\LexiCom\", @"\Accellion\", @"\PaperCut MF\server\"]);
let _known_shells = dynamic(["human2.aspx","_human2.aspx","human.aspx","health.aspx","DEWMODE.html"]);
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
| where (FolderPath has_any (_mft_paths) and (FileName endswith ".aspx" or FileName endswith ".ashx" or FileName endswith ".asp" or FileName endswith ".jsp"))
     or FileName in~ (_known_shells)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, SHA256,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessIntegrityLevel
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cl0p / FIN11 webshell drop on MFT appliances — ASIM file-event view
let _mft_paths = dynamic([@"\MOVEitTransfer\wwwroot\", @"\GoAnywhere\", @"\Cleo\Harmony\", @"\Cleo\VLTrader\", @"\Cleo\LexiCom\", @"\Accellion\", @"\PaperCut MF\server\"]);
let _known_shells = dynamic(["human2.aspx","_human2.aspx","human.aspx","health.aspx","DEWMODE.html"]);
ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where ActingProcessName endswith "w3wp.exe"
| where (TargetFilePath has_any (_mft_paths) and (TargetFileName endswith ".aspx" or TargetFileName endswith ".ashx" or TargetFileName endswith ".asp" or TargetFileName endswith ".jsp"))
     or TargetFileName in~ (_known_shells)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, TargetFilePath, TargetFileName, TargetFileSHA256,
          ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine, ActorUsername
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Cl0p / FIN11 LEMURLOOT-DEWMODE Webshell Drop on MFT Appliance
id: 7c1f9d4e-3a8b-4d12-9b5d-cl0plemurloot01
status: experimental
description: Detects the IIS worker process (w3wp.exe) writing .aspx/.ashx webshells into managed-file-transfer appliance webroots — the LEMURLOOT (human2.aspx) and DEWMODE artefacts dropped by Cl0p / TA505 / FIN11 after exploiting MOVEit (CVE-2023-34362), GoAnywhere (CVE-2023-0669), Cleo (CVE-2024-50623/55956), Accellion FTA and PaperCut zero-days.
references:
  - https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/zero-day-moveit-data-theft
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-158a
  - https://www.fortra.com/security/advisory/fi-2023-01
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1505.003
  - detection.cl0p
  - detection.fin11
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  iis_writer:
    Image|endswith: '\w3wp.exe'
  mft_path:
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\MOVEitTransfer\wwwroot\'
      - '\GoAnywhere\'
      - '\Cleo\Harmony\'
      - '\Cleo\VLTrader\'
      - '\Cleo\LexiCom\'
      - '\Accellion\'
      - '\PaperCut MF\server\'
  shell_ext:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.aspx'
      - '.ashx'
      - '.asp'
      - '.jsp'
  known_shell:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\human2.aspx'
      - '\_human2.aspx'
      - '\human.aspx'
      - '\health.aspx'
      - '\DEWMODE.html'
  condition: (iis_writer and mft_path and shell_ext) or known_shell
falsepositives:
  - Vendor-issued patches or supported plug-ins for the MFT product (validate with change-management tickets)
level: critical
ucs.rationale: MFT appliances are vendor-managed black boxes — w3wp.exe writing freshly-named .aspx into their wwwroot is essentially never legitimate, and the literal filenames human2.aspx / DEWMODE.html are Cl0p tooling artefacts named in CISA AA23-158A and Mandiant's LEMURLOOT advisory. Random APTs aren't burning MFT 0-days at scale; Cl0p is the operator that built its 2021–2024 extortion business on this exa
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Cl0p / TA505 bulk data exfiltration via Rclone / MEGAcmd to MEGA, S3 or WebDAV pre-encryption
ucs.description: Hunts Cl0p's pre-ransomware data-theft stage: a hands-on-keyboard operator drops rclone.exe (often renamed) or MEGAcmd onto a file or DB server and runs `copy / sync / moveto` against a `mega:` / `:s3` / `:webdav` remote. This is the staging step Cl0p has used in every MOVEit, GoAnywhere and Cleo extortion event to upload terabytes to MEGA / cloud buckets BEFORE detonating the Cl0p locker — the data-theft itself is the leverage, not the encryption.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process IN ("*rclone*","*MEGAcmd*","*megatools*","*megaclient*") OR (Processes.process="*--config*" AND Processes.process="*remote:*" AND Processes.process IN ("*copy*","*sync*","*move*","*moveto*","*--transfers*","*--multi-thread-streams*"))) AND Processes.process IN ("*mega:*","*mega.nz*","*mega.co.nz*","*:webdav*","*:s3*","*:dropbox*","*:gdrive*","*:pcloud*","*ftp:*","*sftp:*","*ftps:*") AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// Cl0p / TA505 bulk data exfil — rclone / MEGAcmd to cloud remotes
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("rclone","MEGAcmd","megatools","megaclient.exe")
     or (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("--config","remote:")
         and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("copy","sync","move ","moveto","--transfers","--multi-thread-streams"))
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("mega:","mega.nz","mega.co.nz",":webdav",":s3",":dropbox",":gdrive",":pcloud",":ftp",":sftp",":ftps","backblaze","wasabi")
| extend RenamedRclone = iff(FileName !in~ ("rclone.exe","rclone","MEGAcmdShell.exe","MEGAclient.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "--config", true, false)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession, RenamedRclone
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cl0p / TA505 bulk data exfil — rclone / MEGAcmd to cloud remotes (ASIM)
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| where ActorUsername !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
| where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any ("rclone","MEGAcmd","megatools","megaclient.exe")
     or (TargetProcessCommandLine has_all ("--config","remote:")
         and TargetProcessCommandLine has_any ("copy","sync","move ","moveto","--transfers","--multi-thread-streams"))
| where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any ("mega:","mega.nz","mega.co.nz",":webdav",":s3",":dropbox",":gdrive",":pcloud",":ftp",":sftp",":ftps","backblaze","wasabi")
| extend RenamedRclone = iff(TargetProcessName !endswith "rclone.exe" and TargetProcessName !endswith "MEGAcmdShell.exe" and TargetProcessCommandLine has "--config", true, false)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername, TargetProcessName,
          TargetProcessCommandLine, ParentProcessName, ParentProcessCommandLine, RenamedRclone
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: Cl0p / TA505 / FIN11 has a documented preference for staging stolen MFT and file-server data to MEGA and other public cloud remotes via rclone (frequently renamed to evade naive name-based detections) before dropping the Cl0p locker — Mandiant, CrowdStrike (GRACEFUL SPIDER) and DFIR Report all flag this as a Cl0p signature distinct from REvil / LockBit / BlackCat (which more typically use Mega.nz

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?
